concept.description: Annotates compiled SaltMarcher view-layer types for the cockpit contribution MVVM harness.
concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type) WHERE type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' WITH type, split(type.fqn, '.') AS segments SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType, type.viewBucket = CASE WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'views' AND segments[3] CONTAINS 'DisplayModel' THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 4 AND segments[2] = 'views' THEN 'VIEW' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['tabs', 'topbar', 'state'] AND segments[4] CONTAINS 'Contribution' THEN 'CONTRIBUTION' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['tabs', 'topbar', 'state', 'details'] AND segments[4] CONTAINS 'ViewModel' THEN 'MODEL' WHEN size(segments) >= 5 AND segments[2] IN ['tabs', 'topbar', 'state', 'details'] AND segments[4] CONTAINS 'View' THEN 'VIEW' ELSE 'LEGACY' END, type.relativePath = CASE WHEN type.sourceFileName IS NULL OR type.sourceFileName = '' THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' WHEN type.name IS NULL OR type.name = '' OR NOT type.fqn ENDS WITH '.' + type.name THEN replace(type.fqn, '.', '/') + '.java' ELSE replace(substring(type.fqn, 0, size(type.fqn) - size(type.name) - 1), '.', '/') + '/' + type.sourceFileName END RETURN type AS MvvmViewType
MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' SET type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint RETURN type AS MvvmRootEntrypoint

constraint.description: Cockpit MVVM topology allows active view Java only in contribution roots or reusable src/view/views.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'LEGACY' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/tabs, src/view/topbar, src/view/state, src/view/details, or src/view/views' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Active view Java must use the cockpit contribution topology.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Component-local view buckets are migration debt and forbidden for active Java.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'LEGACY' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/tabs, src/view/topbar, src/view/state, src/view/details, or src/view/views' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Legacy component-local View/ViewModel/api/assembly-style topology is not active target code.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: View contributions are the only shell-facing view-layer entrypoints.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' AND NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' AND NOT type.name ENDS WITH 'Contribution' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, '*Contribution' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Each shell-facing view-layer entrypoint must be one contribution.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each contribution or ViewModel source file owns exactly one top-level type.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WHERE type.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'MODEL'] AND NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level contribution or ViewModel type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A contribution or ViewModel file must define exactly one top-level type.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Passive panel views name their fixed shell surface.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' AND NOT ( (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.views\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'View') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.tabs\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND (type.name ENDS WITH 'ControlsView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'MainView' OR type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView')) OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.topbar\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'TopBarView') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.state\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'StateView') OR (type.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.details\\.[^.]+\\..*' AND type.name ENDS WITH 'DetailsView') ) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'area-specific passive view suffix: tabs use *ControlsView/*MainView/*StateView, topbar uses *TopBarView, state uses *StateView, details use *DetailsView, reusable views use *View' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive view names must identify the shell surface they render.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each passive view source file owns exactly one top-level panel fragment.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WHERE NOT type.name CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level passive panel view type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A passive view file must define exactly one panel fragment.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: At least one shell contribution must exist.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmRootEntrypoint) WITH count(root) AS rootCount WHERE rootCount = 0 RETURN 'src/view/tabs, src/view/topbar, or src/view/state' AS Source, 'at least one shell contribution' AS ExpectedDirection, 'none' AS ActualDirection, 'The shell needs discoverable contributions.' AS Details

constraint.description: Every contribution structurally wires its co-located ViewModel and at least one co-located passive view.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'CONTRIBUTION'}) WHERE NOT source.name CONTAINS '$' WITH source, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments OPTIONAL MATCH (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(model:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'MODEL'}) WITH source, sourceSegments, collect(DISTINCT model) AS modelCandidates WITH source, sourceSegments, [ model IN modelCandidates WHERE model IS NOT NULL AND NOT model.name CONTAINS '$' AND size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(split(model.fqn, '.')) >= 4 AND split(model.fqn, '.')[2] = sourceSegments[2] AND split(model.fqn, '.')[3] = sourceSegments[3] ] AS ownModels OPTIONAL MATCH (source)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(view:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'VIEW'}) WITH source, size(ownModels) AS ownModelCount, collect(DISTINCT view) AS viewCandidates WITH source, ownModelCount, [ view IN viewCandidates WHERE view IS NOT NULL AND NOT view.name CONTAINS '$' AND size(split(view.fqn, '.')) >= 4 AND split(view.fqn, '.')[2] = split(source.fqn, '.')[2] AND split(view.fqn, '.')[3] = split(source.fqn, '.')[3] ] AS ownViews WITH source, ownModelCount, size(ownViews) AS ownViewCount WHERE ownModelCount = 0 OR ownViewCount = 0 RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, 'direct dependency on the co-located ViewModel and at least one co-located passive View' AS ExpectedDirection, CASE WHEN ownModelCount = 0 AND ownViewCount = 0 THEN 'missing co-located ViewModel and passive View dependency' WHEN ownModelCount = 0 THEN 'missing co-located ViewModel dependency' ELSE 'missing co-located passive View dependency' END AS ActualDirection, 'Contributions must be shell adapters that instantiate and bind their own model and view surface.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Passive panel views depend only on same-root or reusable passive views.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE source.viewBucket = 'VIEW' AND ( target.viewBucket <> 'VIEW' AND NOT ( source.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.views\\..*' AND target.viewBucket = 'MODEL' AND target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.views\\..*' ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.(tabs|topbar|state|details)\\..*' AND NOT ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) ) OR ( source.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.views\\..*' AND NOT (target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.views\\..*') ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'passive views may depend only on same-root passive views or reusable src.view.views passive views' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Passive views must remain shell-free, domain-free, ViewModel-free, and foreign-view-root-free.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: Contributions may bind passive views, use shell API, and call only domain application-service roots.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'CONTRIBUTION'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.host\\..*' OR (target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.api\\..*') OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..+' ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND ( NOT (target.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'MODEL', 'VIEW']) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\.(tabs|topbar|state|details)\\..*' AND NOT ( size(targetSegments) >= 5 AND targetSegments[2] = 'details' AND target.viewBucket IN ['MODEL', 'VIEW'] ) AND NOT ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'shell.api, same-root ViewModels, same-root/reusable/detail passive views, detail ViewModels, domain application-service roots, and published carriers only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Contributions must not depend on old view topology, data, bootstrap, shell internals, or domain internals.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target

constraint.description: ViewModels stay independent from shell APIs and concrete views.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:MvvmViewType {viewBucket: 'MODEL'})-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.[^.]+ApplicationService(\\$.*)?' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\.[^.]+\\.published\\..+' ) OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND ( NOT (target.viewBucket = 'MODEL') OR NOT ( ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] ) OR ( size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND targetSegments[2] = 'views' AND targetSegments[3] CONTAINS 'DisplayModel' ) ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'JavaFX bindable state, same-root ViewModels, and domain public boundaries only' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'ViewModels must not depend on shell APIs, concrete views, data, bootstrap, or domain internals.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
